# API surface parity

Every public operation is available through the TypeScript SDK. Ownership identifies the self-hosted
core contract or a Blob Yard Cloud extension. Authorization records the required user scopes and
alternative CI actions. Risk classifies read, write, sensitive, and destructive operations. The CLI
and MCP columns name the explicit presentation adapter, or explain why a direct adapter would be
unsafe or meaningless.

Onboarding progress is explicitly classified as derived browser UI state. It is not a stable API
resource, so it is excluded from the SDK, CLI, and MCP surfaces.

| Operation                         | HTTP                                | Ownership          | Authorization                                         | Risk          | CLI                                                                                                                                              | MCP                                                                                                                                              |
| --------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `abortUpload`                     | `POST /uploads/abort`               | `core`             | user:`object:write`<br>ci:`upload`                    | `destructive` | `upload`                                                                                                                                         | `blobyard_upload_file`                                                                                                                           |
| `clearRetention`                  | `DELETE /retention`                 | `core`             | user:`retention:manage`                               | `destructive` | `retention clear`                                                                                                                                | `blobyard_clear_retention`                                                                                                                       |
| `completeAccountDeletion`         | `POST /account/deletion/complete`   | `hosted-extension` | user:`account:delete`                                 | `destructive` | `account delete complete`                                                                                                                        | Excluded: Destructive completion requires explicit human-owned confirmation outside model context.                                               |
| `completeUpload`                  | `POST /uploads/complete`            | `core`             | user:`object:write`<br>ci:`upload`                    | `write`       | `upload`                                                                                                                                         | `blobyard_upload_file`                                                                                                                           |
| `createApiToken`                  | `POST /api-tokens`                  | `core`             | user:`tokens:manage`                                  | `sensitive`   | `tokens create`                                                                                                                                  | Excluded: MCP must not return a newly created bearer credential to model context.                                                                |
| `createBillingCheckout`           | `POST /billing/checkout`            | `hosted-extension` | user:`billing:manage`                                 | `sensitive`   | `billing checkout`                                                                                                                               | Excluded: Returns a Stripe hosted-session bearer capability URL that must not enter model context.                                               |
| `createBillingPortal`             | `POST /billing/portal`              | `hosted-extension` | user:`billing:manage`                                 | `sensitive`   | `billing portal`                                                                                                                                 | Excluded: Returns a Stripe hosted-session bearer capability URL that must not enter model context.                                               |
| `createBillingSubscriptionUpdate` | `POST /billing/subscription/update` | `hosted-extension` | user:`billing:manage`                                 | `sensitive`   | `billing update`                                                                                                                                 | Excluded: Returns a Stripe hosted-session bearer capability URL that must not enter model context.                                               |
| `createCiTrust`                   | `POST /ci/trusts`                   | `core`             | user:`ci:manage`                                      | `sensitive`   | `trusts create`                                                                                                                                  | `blobyard_create_ci_trust`                                                                                                                       |
| `createInbox`                     | `POST /inboxes`                     | `core`             | user:`inbox:manage`                                   | `sensitive`   | `inbox create`                                                                                                                                   | `blobyard_create_inbox`                                                                                                                          |
| `createInvite`                    | `POST /members/invites`             | `hosted-extension` | user:`members:manage`                                 | `sensitive`   | `invites create`                                                                                                                                 | `blobyard_create_invite`                                                                                                                         |
| `createOneTimeSecret`             | `POST /secrets`                     | `hosted-extension` | Special or public authority                           | `sensitive`   | Excluded: Secret material and encryption or decryption must remain in a human-controlled browser or client and must not enter MCP model context. | Excluded: Secret material and encryption or decryption must remain in a human-controlled browser or client and must not enter MCP model context. |
| `createPreview`                   | `POST /previews`                    | `core`             | user:`share:manage`                                   | `sensitive`   | `preview`                                                                                                                                        | `blobyard_create_preview`                                                                                                                        |
| `createProject`                   | `POST /projects`                    | `core`             | user:`project:write`                                  | `write`       | `projects create`                                                                                                                                | `blobyard_create_project`                                                                                                                        |
| `createShare`                     | `POST /shares`                      | `core`             | user:`share:manage`<br>ci:`share`                     | `sensitive`   | `share`                                                                                                                                          | `blobyard_create_share`                                                                                                                          |
| `createStorageCheckout`           | `POST /billing/storage/checkout`    | `hosted-extension` | user:`billing:manage`                                 | `sensitive`   | `billing storage checkout`                                                                                                                       | Excluded: Returns a Stripe hosted-session bearer capability URL that must not enter model context.                                               |
| `createStorageUpdate`             | `POST /billing/storage/update`      | `hosted-extension` | user:`billing:manage`                                 | `sensitive`   | `billing storage update`                                                                                                                         | Excluded: Returns a Stripe hosted-session bearer capability URL that must not enter model context.                                               |
| `createWorkspace`                 | `POST /workspaces`                  | `core`             | user:`project:write`                                  | `write`       | `workspaces create`                                                                                                                              | `blobyard_create_workspace`                                                                                                                      |
| `deleteObject`                    | `DELETE /objects`                   | `core`             | user:`object:write`                                   | `destructive` | `rm`                                                                                                                                             | `blobyard_delete_object`                                                                                                                         |

Use the CLI or SDK.                                                                   |
| `downloadShare`                   | `POST /shares/download`             | `core`             | Special or public authority                           | `sensitive`   | Excluded: The public capability URL downloads this object.                                                                                       | Excluded: The public capability URL downloads this object.                                                                                       |

| `exchangeGitHubOidc`              | `POST /ci/github/oidc/exchange`     | `core`             | Special or public authority                           | `sensitive`   | Excluded: GitHub Actions exchanges its assertion directly.                                                                                       | Excluded: GitHub Actions exchanges its assertion directly.                                                                                       |
